title: Floor 1: Stage Recognition
purpose: Practice identifying the developmental pressure behind the selected state.

questions.prompt: A character reacts as if help cannot be trusted and takes control before anyone can respond. Which stage pressure is most visible?
questions.hint: Look for safety, trust, dependence, and the fear that support will fail.

questions.prompt: The main need underneath the reaction is a stable, reliable environment. Which stage does this point toward?
questions.hint: Stage 1 centers on whether the world feels dependable.

questions.prompt: In Course 10 terms, the healthiest response to this pressure is to rebuild consistency and reliable support. What is being restored?
questions.hint: Course 10 frames long-term health around sustainable routines and support.
